data.body: [operator-attested] AC4 satisfied: the three obsolete auto-lander bugs are now CLOSED as of the d0e5 land (main commit 5b5f8983c, 2026-07-13). Close events: dc33-4adf-4e4b-4fd0 (annotation-store) -> closed; 15a1-e77b-fb31-4924 (FF-string-match drive loop) -> closed; 0d3e-8205-1e35-4db4 (Autosubmit dropped on rebase) -> closed. All force-closed as obsolete (resolved by deleting infra/autolander in d0e5), per ADR 0047.
